title: TTRP Pizza Castle Pack
description: A Resource pack containing custom named food models and textures for the Pizza Castle pizza shop in TallTalesRP
body:
A resource pack containing custom models and textures for named food items at the Pizza Castle pizza shop on the TallTalesRP server. More models will be added over time. So far it only includes pizzas.

List of Models so far:

Pizzas
- The Peasant's Comfort
- The Knight's Delight
- The Boar Hunter's Prize
- The Warband's Feast
- The Explorer's Bounty
- The King's Decree
- The Monk's Harvest
